name: B & B Pawn and Gold
description_short: B & B Pawn and Gold is a Mesa-based pawn shop offering gold and precious metals buying, pawn loans, and auto title loans through a partner company.
description_long: B & B Pawn and Gold has operated as a pawn shop in Mesa, Arizona for over 10 years, serving the East Valley community including Phoenix, Tempe, Chandler, Gilbert, and Apache Junction. The shop is conveniently located on East Main Street and accessible by Light Rail. The company positions itself as a full-service pawn operation with experienced staff boasting over 30 years of combined experience. B & B Pawn and Gold offers multiple financial services centered on converting personal items and valuables into immediate cash. Their primary offerings include buying gold, silver, platinum, and other precious metals at rates they claim are higher than competitors. They accept jewelry (rings, necklaces, watches, bracelets, broken and scrap gold), diamonds, electronics, musical instruments, electric guitars and amplifiers, cameras, recorders, and power tools either as outright purchases or as collateral for pawn loans. Additionally, they provide auto title loans through a partnership with Phoenix Title Loans, LLC. The company advertises same-day transactions and emphasizes speed—customers can walk in with items and leave with cash within minutes. What distinguishes B & B Pawn and Gold is their emphasis on competitive pricing for precious metals, their breadth of acceptable collateral beyond just jewelry, and their decade-plus track record in the Mesa market. They are BBB Accredited and notably welcome Mexican identification, suggesting inclusive service practices. Their marketing focuses heavily on being "the best" gold buyer in Mesa with the "most cash" available, though these are claims rather than independently verified metrics. The honest assessment is that B & B Pawn and Gold serves a legitimate niche for consumers needing quick cash by liquidating personal property or obtaining short-term loans against collateral. However, like all pawn operations, customers should understand that pawn loans carry implicit costs (interest and storage fees) and that outright sales result in permanent loss of items. The company does not disclose specific interest rates, terms, or fees on their website, which is typical but leaves consumers unable to compare costs before visiting.
pros: BBB Accredited business with established reputation in Mesa area for over 10 years
Staff has over 30 years of combined experience serving East Valley customers
Accepts wide variety of collateral beyond jewelry: electronics, instruments, tools, cameras, and more
Same-day cash transactions—customers can complete sales or pawn loans in minutes
Welcomes Mexican identification, indicating inclusive service practices
Conveniently located on East Main Street with Light Rail accessibility
Offers auto title loans through partnership with Phoenix Title Loans, LLC
cons: Website does not disclose specific interest rates, terms, or fees for pawn loans, making cost comparison impossible
Claims about paying 'the most cash' and 'highest rates' are marketing statements without third-party verification
Pawn loans inherently carry interest and storage fees that reduce net value compared to outright sales
No transparency on loan default consequences or item forfeiture procedures
Limited online presence—no obvious online booking or valuation system despite having a website
best_for: Consumers with gold, silver, or jewelry who need immediate cash and prefer in-person transactions with face-to-face evaluation
People needing short-term loans who own vehicles and can use auto title loans as collateral
East Valley residents with non-jewelry valuables (instruments, electronics, tools) seeking rapid liquidation
Individuals seeking an alternative to traditional credit who have physical assets to leverage
diagnosis: B & B Pawn and Gold is best for East Valley residents who own jewelry, precious metals, or other valuables and need immediate cash without credit checks or a lengthy approval process. The main caveat is that pawn loans carry undisclosed interest and fees, and customers should visit in person to understand total costs and loan terms before committing to a transaction.
services: Gold buying and evaluation at claimed competitive rates
Silver, platinum, coins, bars, and ingots buying
Jewelry buying (rings, necklaces, watches, bracelets, broken gold, scrap gold)
Pawn loans on jewelry and precious metals
Musical instrument pawn loans (electric guitars, amps)
Auto title loans (provided through Phoenix Title Loans, LLC partnership)
Same-day cash transactions for purchases and loans
Outright purchase of items or collateral-based pawn lending options
